positive: A stylized geometric depiction of a mythical forest at dawn. The scene features winding, stylized vines and abstract, monolithic trees with crystalline bark. The primary colors are deep indigo, teal, and vibrant gold, contrasting sharply with emerald green accents. The composition uses strong vertical lines and negative space, creating a balanced, symmetrical silhouette ideal for apparel printing. Focus on clean, interlocking shapes and high contrast linework. Minimalist vaporwave aesthetic meets Art Nouveau geometry. Clean edges, flat vector graphic quality, central composition, high detail, perfect for screen printing.
